extortion.description: [AI generated] Trucchi's Supermarkets, Inc. is a chain of family-owned supermarkets based in Taunton, Massachusetts, USA. It was established by William M. Trucchi Sr. in 1928. Currently, the company operates six full-service supermarkets in Massachusetts. Trucchi's places emphasis on providing value to customers by offering fresh quality products and personal customer service. They also offer custom cake designs through their bakery department.
